title: Resin Clump Advancement
description: This Datapack and Mod adds a new advancement for obtaining a Resin Clump, translated into multiple languages (+20), compatible with version 1.21.4 to 26.1
body:
# Resin Clump Advancement

**This DataPack and Mod** adds new advancement for obtaining a Resin Clump, translated into multiple languages, compatible with version 1.21.4 to 26.1

![Resin Clump Advancement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a447a50daba1b8ff0037e7752cd2046eca3a71eb.png)
> **Advancement Labs © - 2026**

## Notas📝 (Notes)
- **Resin Clump Advancement** is **compatible** with versions **1.21.4 to 26.1**🏷️
- **Resin Clump Advancement** is compatible with any **functions and advancements Datapack in the World**
- **Resin Clump Advancement** it has been translated into more than **20 Languages**
- **No** it is necessary to **unzip** the downloaded file 🗂️
